name: LinkedInstanceDefinitionUpdateStyle
summary: Linked and linked and embedded instance definition update style.

enum_values.name: Prompt
enum_values.summary: Ask the user if the linked and linked and embedded instance definitions should be updated.

enum_values.name: AlwaysUpdate
enum_values.summary: Always update linked and linked and embedded instance definitions.

enum_values.name: NeverUpdate
enum_values.summary: Never update linked and linked and embedded instance definitions.
